series_metadata.series_description: Microfilm tapes created for long term case history reference accessible by name, serial number, tax identification number (tin), social security number, vendors license, and permit number (liquor). Information includes, but is not limited to, payments, judgment information, case history, actions on an account, levy information, period due, financial information, and permit information.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain until no longer of use or has been converted to office's collections electronic bookkeeping system., Microform: Shred
